task_completion.description: Verify the 'PATIO' floor section was created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Floreant POS Back Office, under the floor or section configuration window, there should be an entry named 'PATIO'.

task_completion.description: Verify the six patio tables were created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Floreant POS Back Office table configuration window, there should be entries for tables named 'P1', 'P2', 'P3', 'P4', 'P5', and 'P6'.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'LIQUOR TAX' was created with the correct rate.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Tax configuration window, there should be an entry named 'LIQUOR TAX' with a rate of '9.5' or '9.5%'.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'PATIO SPECIALS' menu category was created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Menu Category configuration window, there should be an entry named 'PATIO SPECIALS'.

task_completion.description: Verify the five patio menu items were created with correct pricing.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Menu Items list or configuration windows, look for 'SANGRIA PITCHER' ($18.00), 'PALOMA COCKTAIL' ($11.00), 'DRAFT BEER PATIO' ($6.50), 'LOADED NACHOS' ($13.95), and 'GRILLED CORN' ($4.75).

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the Floreant POS GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Floreant POS Back Office interface being actively used (e.g., clicking buttons, filling forms), not terminal commands or database scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not just type the answers into a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text and configurations must appear within the actual Floreant POS application windows, not in Notepad, gedit, or any other text editor.

integrity.description: Verify the configuration windows match the expected Floreant POS dialogs.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for standard Floreant POS dialog boxes like 'Add/Edit Menu Item', 'Add/Edit Tax', and 'Add/Edit Table' rather than mocked or unrelated application windows.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires configuring the Floreant POS Back Office. Expected values: Floor section = 'PATIO'. Tables = 'P1', 'P2', 'P3', 'P4', 'P5', 'P6'. Tax = 'LIQUOR TAX' at 9.5%. Menu Category = 'PATIO SPECIALS'. Menu Items and Prices = 'SANGRIA PITCHER' ($18.00), 'PALOMA COCKTAIL' ($11.00), 'DRAFT BEER PATIO' ($6.50), 'LOADED NACHOS' ($13.95), 'GRILLED CORN' ($4.75).
